title: Criticality
description: Service criticality + data classification (adopted from resiliency-skills' criticality schema, on our byte-grounded envelope). Drives the deterministic alert severity floor and blast-radius weighting. `tier`/`businessCriticality` are declared (catalog/human) and grounded to the declaring file; `dataClassification` can be re-derived deterministically from PII/PCI signatures in code (HYBRID-PLAN Round-3 R1).
